sys_script_client.description: Removes "Global Process, OU Process" options from process template forms for users who do not have the required roles to create/view/run those types of process templates 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-15 | raj | STRY0143870 - For OU Templates, define Run Permissions if enabled
sys_script_client.name: Task - onLoad Restrict New Process Templ
sys_script_client.sys_name: Task - onLoad Restrict New Process Templ
